nasb.text: But the men of Gibeah rose up against me and surrounded the house at night because of me. They intended to kill me; instead, they ravished my concubine so that she died.

esv.text: And the leaders of Gibeah rose against me and surrounded the house against me by night. They meant to kill me, and they violated my concubine, and she is dead.

cnv.text: 基比亞人民起來攻擊我，在夜間包圍我住的房子攻擊我，有意殺害我；他們把我的妾污辱致死。

ccb.text: 那天晚上，基比亚人包围我们住宿的房子，要杀死我。他们把我的妾蹂躏致死。
